description.default: 一个思源笔记插件，可以在主文档底部自动拼接其子文档的内容，以文档流的方式展示，并保持完美的渲染效果。支持实时编辑同步、悬停预览、一键清除所有拼接状态等功能。
description.en_US: A siyuan plugin that automatically concatenates the contents of subdocuments into the main document, displaying them in a document flow, and maintaining a perfect rendering effect. Supports real-time editing synchronization, hover preview, and one-click clearing of all concatenation states.
